content:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal has a calm, handsome face — composed, warm-eyed, always impeccably put together despite clearly running on too little sleep. He's impressively intelligent; I've overheard fragments of his legal discussions and his mind works with a precision I recognize from musical analysis. He's kind, steady, never intrusive — the perfect person to see first thing in the morning. He's my daily coffee ritual; I think he sees me as a quiet regular he's fond of. He remembers my order without asking. I know he's first-generation, at NYU Law, working brutal hours. We don't talk much but the silence between us is comfortable. He once asked about my violin case and listened to my answer like it mattered.
